name: FLORENTINE GROTESCHI #7
description: Florentine Groteschi #7 is a crt goblin single-panel relic built around Raphael and Vaporwave Medici Mall. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Il Matto, used here as the witness card. Bombardiro Crocodilo in a fake bestiary page gets pulled into a zodiac-risk dashboard for patron liquidity, making the panel read like a corrupted receipt for belief, status, and patronage. The archive files it under miracle-adjacent behaviour. The generated insert, a low-res dove dropping governance ballots, acts as the modern clue; Gematria marks RENTFREE at Σ 546.

attributes.value: a low-res dove dropping governance ballots

florentine_groteschi.collector_note: Custom top-level lore data: not an OpenSea trait list, but intentionally readable in the raw token JSON.

chess_piece.name: Bishop

rarity.ranking_rule: Higher chess strength/rank is intentionally rarer: Pawn common, Knight/Bishop uncommon, Rook rare, Queen epic, King legendary.

board_position.position_rule: Deterministic per-token board square reserved for future game/use mechanics; independent of visible glyph placement.

chess_piece.allocation_rule: Weighted deterministic shuffled chess allocation by piece strength: {'Pawn': 560, 'Knight': 280, 'Bishop': 280, 'Rook': 168, 'Queen': 84, 'King': 29}
chess_piece.metadata_visibility: Hidden from OpenSea attributes; stored only in florentine_groteschi.hidden_traits.
chess_piece.visual_rule: A small unlabeled foreground chess glyph shows the chess-piece graphic with the piece name encoded underneath; that visible code is intentionally not serialized in metadata.

artwork_breakdown.generated_insert: a low-res dove dropping governance ballots

tarocchi_fiorentini.allocation_rule: 14 complete 97-card sets across 1,401 tokens, plus 43 deterministic extras

artwork_breakdown.composition_read: Raphael anchors the historical source. Il Matto supplies the witness logic. The low-res dove dropping governance ballots acts as the modern meme-object. The crt goblin palette and Vaporwave Medici Mall styling make the panel read like a corrupted Renaissance case file.

groteschi_explanation.plain_english: Read plainly: Raphael is treated as evidence in a notary case. The old-world clue is Bombardiro Crocodilo in a fake bestiary page; the modern-world echo is a zodiac-risk dashboard for patron liquidity. The joke is that patronage, holy paperwork, and marketplace verification are all status systems asking who gets believed.
groteschi_explanation.read_between_the_lines: The Il Matto card is not decorative; it tells you how to read the room. The old clue and the modern clue compete as evidence, so the panel becomes a custody argument about belief, status, and receipts. The archive files it under miracle-adjacent behaviour. The slang turns sacred authority into aura, patronage into clout economics, and marginalia into groupchat evidence.

slang_for_normal_plebs.translation_for_normal_plebs: did it perfectly; in this collection a fresco, saint, or relic can 'eat' like a viral post
status, presence, or holy-looking social charge; Renaissance clout converted into meme units
opponent or enemy; in this world a rival guild, collector, or saintly antagonist

hidden_solution.method: Split the visible marker into DNA triplets, translate each triplet through the genetic-code table, then read the amino-acid letters as the source Base name. Non-standard letters use documented stop/nearest triplet placeholders.

hidden_acrostic.method: Read the first character of each acrostic line; slashes are spaces.

collector_warnings: Do not cite the notary after midnight.
Opening the metadata counts as participation in the trial.
Do not let the codon marker breed near the provenance strip.
If the ledger balances, something has gone terribly wrong.
Il Matto is a witness, not a decorative rectangle.
